title: Waymo
subtitle: Full-time job since Dec 15th, 2025, still enjoying it
summary: A former colleague asked me if I am interested in Waymo after my previous project was cancelled and the entire team was laid off by Verily. Apparently I said yes and now I am working on building the labeling platform that powers the ML models in Waymo.

blocks.text: I am in a team spanning across data, model and ops, a lot of new stuff to learn with a lot of new opportunities. The progress that Waymo is making is very exciting and I wish to be able to stay here until its potential IPO.
